CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Show media – display input video or scenesat logo
CONTROLS.NAME: use_media

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Audio intensity – amplify spectrum in hyperspace
CONTROLS.NAME: spectrum_boost

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: CRT scanlines – add retro screen effect
CONTROLS.NAME: crt_effect

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Screen position – depth of inner reflections plane
CONTROLS.NAME: screen_distance

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Camera distance – zoom in/out from satellite
CONTROLS.NAME: satellite_distance

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Show satellite – toggle satellite on or off
CONTROLS.NAME: show_satellite

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Screen brightness – intensity of inner screen
CONTROLS.NAME: screen_brightness

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Color base - hyperspace lines base color
CONTROLS.NAME: color_base

DESCRIPTION: A glowing pink heart floats at the center of a geometric hyperspace tunnel, surrounded by pulsing golden structures hurtling through space. The satellite camera sways hypnotically while audio reactivity drives the intensity of the chromatic tunnel walls. CRT scanlines flicker across this retro-futuristic dreamscape, blending romance with 80s synthwave aesthetics. Created for SceneSat.
TITLE: Hyperspace Scenesat
